hero.subheadline: ReqsAI listens to your elicitation sessions in real time and automatically generates structured User Stories with Gherkin acceptance criteria — so you never miss a critical edge case again.
hero.note: No credit card required · Cancel anytime

mockup.ai_text: Consider the edge case: what happens when the user has no active subscription but tries to access a premium feature?
mockup.given: a user with a free account
mockup.when: they navigate to a premium section
mockup.and: their current path is saved for post-upgrade redirect

features.title: Everything your team needs to elicit requirements perfectly
features.subtitle: From the meeting to a sprint-ready backlog, without friction.
features.live_desc: Real-time prompts during client meetings to surface hidden edge cases and logic gaps before the call ends.
features.gherkin_desc: Structured Given-When-Then acceptance criteria generated instantly from meeting transcripts, ready to export.
features.rag_desc: Detects requirement duplication and automatically aligns with your existing architecture using your project history.
features.privacy_desc: Schema-per-tenant isolation to guarantee that each organization's data is completely separate and secure.
features.jira_desc: Export approved User Stories directly to your Jira or Azure DevOps backlog with one click, in under 10 minutes.
features.collab_desc: Share, comment and approve User Stories with the whole team before they reach the sprint. Full traceability included.
